title: Navigating the 2D viewport — zoom and pan controls
capture_instructions: Split-viewport layout. The 2D viewport is zoomed in on a section of the cross-section showing individual point returns clearly. The cursor should be positioned within the 2D viewport (hovering, not dragging). Optionally show a scroll-wheel cursor icon overlay if possible.
ui_state: Plan/Profile active, 2D viewport zoomed in on road cross-section, cursor in 2D panel

annotations.label: 2D viewport — navigation is independent of the 3D view
Zoomed area — individual point returns visible
